dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Welcome to TattooTalks, the tattoo community
dashboard.description: Explore discussions on all aspects of tattooing: styles, techniques, studio management, equipment and much more.

rooms.subtitle: Explore our themed rooms
rooms.description: Discover all discussions on various tattoo topics. Join rooms dedicated to artists and enthusiasts.
rooms.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this room? All posts and discussions will also be deleted.
rooms.searchPlaceholder: Search for a room by title or description...
rooms.firstToCreate: Be the first to create a discussion room!
rooms.createRoomDescription: Create a discussion space around a tattoo-related topic: styles, techniques, equipment, studio management, legislation, etc.

roomDescriptions.inspirationsStyles: For all tattoo enthusiasts! Discover and share references, diverse styles, and inspiration. Whether you're an artist, future tattoo client, or simply curious: blackwork, realism, Japanese, geometric... Explore the world of tattoos!
roomDescriptions.materielTechniques: Artists and enthusiasts: discover professional equipment (machines, needles, inks), tattooing techniques, and aftercare products. Questions about your future tattoo? Community experts are here to help!
roomDescriptions.portfoliosFeedback: Artists, share your creations! Enthusiasts and future clients, give your feedback and discover inspiring portfolios. A supportive space to exchange, learn, and inspire each other!
roomDescriptions.apprentisFormations: For those learning tattooing: apprentices, mentors, and curious minds. Exchange advice, share training opportunities, ask questions about the professional path, and build your network!
roomDescriptions.hygieneSecurite: For everyone: artists, studios, and future clients. Learn best hygiene practices, health regulations, sterile equipment, and how to recognize a serious studio. Your safety first!
roomDescriptions.guestSpotsCollabs: Studios and artists: post your guest spot availability. Enthusiasts: discover where your favorite artists will be traveling and find creative collaboration opportunities!
roomDescriptions.businessMarketing: For professionals and aspiring tattoo entrepreneurs: communication strategies, social media, pricing, client relations, online visibility. Turn your passion into a thriving business!
roomDescriptions.evenementsConventions: For the entire community! Conventions, expos, festivals, and tattoo shows. Artists, studios, and enthusiasts: share your experiences, discover upcoming events, and meet the community!
roomDescriptions.tattooCafe: The chill zone for everyone! Artists, enthusiasts, curious minds: chat freely about music, art, culture, lifestyle, movies, travel. Share your stories, favorites, and relax!
roomDescriptions.conseilsClients: For artists and future clients! Advice on artist-client relationships, tattoo preparation, aftercare, touch-ups, cover-ups of old tattoos. Questions and experiences welcome!

share.instagramCopied: Link copied! Open Instagram and paste it in your story or post

contactPage.title: Contact Us
contactPage.subtitle: Get in Touch
contactPage.description: Have questions or feedback? We'd love to hear from you!

info.title: Response Time
info.description: We typically respond within 24-48 hours during business days.

contactPage.success: Message sent successfully! We'll get back to you soon.
contactPage.error: Error sending message. Please try again.

privacyPage.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPage.intro: TattooTalks ("we", "our", or "us") is committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you use our mobile application.

infoCollect.title: Information We Collect
infoCollect.personalDesc: When you create an account, we collect:
personalItems: City and country (to facilitate local connections with artists/enthusiasts)
infoCollect.contentDesc: We collect content you create and share on the platform:
infoCollect.usageDesc: We automatically collect certain information about your device and how you interact with the App:

dataUse.title: How We Use Your Information
dataUse.description: We use the information we collect to:
items: Provide and maintain the App
Create and manage your account
Enable social features and interactions
Send you notifications about activity on your content
Personalize your experience
Improve our services
Respond to your requests and support needs
Detect and prevent fraud or abuse
Comply with legal obligations

dataShare.title: How We Share Your Information
dataShare.visibilityDesc: We offer settings that allow you to control who sees your content:
dataShare.publicProfilesDesc: By default (or if selected), your profile, "Talks", and list of following/followers are visible to all users of the App.
dataShare.privateProfilesDesc: You can choose to make your account private. If you do so, your "Talks" and follower lists are only visible to users you have approved as followers. You have the right to remove followers at any time, which will revoke their access to your private content.
dataShare.socialSharingDesc: Our App includes features that allow you to generate images of your content (e.g., "TalkCards") to share on third-party social media platforms (like Instagram). When you use these features:
socialSharingItems: An image is generated locally on your device.
Once you share this image outside of TattooTalks, the information contained in the image becomes subject to the privacy policies of the third-party platform you share it to.
dataShare.serviceProvidersDesc: We may share your information with third-party service providers who help us operate the App:
dataShare.legalRequirementsDesc: We may disclose your information if required by law or in response to valid legal requests.

dataSecurity.title: Data Security
dataSecurity.description: We implement appropriate security measures to protect your information:
items: Passwords are encrypted using industry-standard methods
Data is transmitted over secure HTTPS connections
Access to personal data is restricted to authorized personnel
Regular security audits and updates
dataSecurity.disclaimer: However, no method of transmission over the internet is 100% secure. While we strive to protect your information, we cannot guarantee absolute security.

dataRights.title: Your Data Rights
rights: Access the personal information we hold about you
Request deletion of your account and data
Object to processing of your information
Export your data in a portable format
Withdraw consent for certain processing activities
Control your privacy: You can switch between a Public and Private profile at any time via your account settings
dataRights.accountDeletionDesc: Users have the right to request the deletion of their account and all associated data. This can be done directly within the application settings.
accountDeletionStepsList: Go to your Profile settings in the App
dataRights.accountDeletionNote: When you delete your account, all your personal data and content will be permanently removed from our servers. This action is irreversible. For other data rights requests, please contact us at privacy@tattootalks.com
dataRights.contact: To exercise these rights, please contact us at

dataRetention.title: Data Retention
dataRetention.description: We retain your information for as long as your account is active or as needed to provide services. When you delete your account, we will delete or anonymize your personal information within 30 days, except where we are required to retain it for legal purposes.

childrenPrivacy.title: Children's Privacy
childrenPrivacy.description: TattooTalks is intended for users aged 18 and older. We do not knowingly collect information from anyone under 18 years of age. If we become aware that we have collected personal information from someone under 18, we will take steps to delete that information.

dataTransfers.title: International Data Transfers
dataTransfers.description: Your information may be transferred to and processed in countries other than your own. These countries may have different data protection laws. By using the App, you consent to such transfers.

cookies.title: Cookies and Tracking
cookies.description: We use local storage and similar technologies to:
items: Remember your preferences
Keep you logged in
Understand how you use the App
Improve our services

thirdParty.title: Third-Party Links
thirdParty.description: The App may contain links to third-party websites or services. We are not responsible for the privacy practices of these third parties. We encourage you to review their privacy policies.

emailComms.title: Email Communications
items: Welcome emails when you join
Notification emails about activity on your content
Service updates and announcements
Security alerts
emailComms.preferences: You can manage your email preferences in your account settings.

policyChanges.title: Changes to This Policy
policyChanges.description: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of any material changes by posting the new policy on this page and updating the "Last updated" date. Your continued use of the App after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated policy.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.description: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy or our data practices, please contact us at:

acceptance.title: Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.description: By accessing and using TattooTalks ("the App"), you accept and agree to be bound by the terms and provision of this agreement. If you do not agree to these Terms and Conditions, please do not use the App.

service.title: Description of Service
service.description: TattooTalks is a social platform designed for tattoo artists and enthusiasts to connect, share ideas, discuss techniques, and build a community around tattoo art and culture.

accounts.title: User Accounts
items: You must be at least 18 years old to create an account
You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials
You are responsible for all activities that occur under your account
You must provide accurate and complete information when creating your account
You may not use another user's account without permission
accounts.privacySettingsDesc: You have the option to set your account to "Private". While this limits visibility to approved followers, you acknowledge that all content, regardless of privacy settings, remains subject to our Content Moderation policies and Terms of Service.

userContent.title: User Content & Social Sharing
items: You retain ownership of content you post on TattooTalks
By posting content, you grant TattooTalks a non-exclusive license to use, display, and distribute your content within the App
You are solely responsible for the content you post
You must not post content that is illegal, offensive, or infringes on others' rights
We reserve the right to remove content that violates these terms
userContent.socialSharingDesc: The App provides features allowing you to export content (e.g., "TalkCards") to third-party services (such as Instagram). By using this feature, you agree that you are solely responsible for the content you share on these external platforms and must comply with their respective terms of service.

prohibited.title: Prohibited Activities
items: Use the App for any illegal purpose
Harass, abuse, or harm other users
Post spam or unsolicited advertising
Impersonate others or provide false information
Attempt to gain unauthorized access to the App
Use automated systems to access the App without permission
Post content containing viruses or malicious code

intellectualProperty.title: Intellectual Property
intellectualProperty.description: The App and its original content, features, and functionality are owned by TattooTalks and are protected by international copyright, trademark, and other intellectual property laws.

ageRequirements.title: Age Requirements
ageRequirements.description: Given the nature of tattoo-related content, users must be at least 18 years old to use this App. We do not knowingly collect information from anyone under 18 years of age.

moderation.title: Content Moderation
moderation.description: We reserve the right to monitor, review, and remove content at our discretion. This includes content that violates these terms or is otherwise objectionable, whether posted on a Public or Private profile.

ugcPolicy.title: User Generated Content Policy - Zero Tolerance for Objectionable Content
ugcPolicy.intro: TattooTalks maintains a strict zero-tolerance policy for objectionable, inappropriate, or illegal content. By using TattooTalks, you explicitly agree to the following:
ugcPolicy.prohibitedContentDesc: Users must not post, upload, share, or distribute any content that includes:
prohibitedItems: Abusive content: Content that harasses, bullies, threatens, or demeans other users
Hateful content: Content that promotes hatred, discrimination, or violence against individuals or groups
Pornographic or sexually explicit content: Any content of a sexual nature, nudity (excluding artistic tattoo work), or sexual solicitation
Illegal content: Content that violates local, national, or international laws
Violent content: Graphic violence, gore, or content that promotes or glorifies violence
Misinformation: Deliberately false or misleading information
Spam: Unsolicited commercial content or repetitive messaging
Copyright infringement: Content that violates intellectual property rights
enforcementItems: Immediate removal: Any content identified as objectionable will be removed immediately without prior notice
Account suspension or permanent ban: Users who post objectionable content will face immediate account suspension or permanent ban from the platform
No appeals for severe violations: Accounts banned for posting illegal, hateful, or pornographic content will not be reinstated
Content moderation: By using this App, you acknowledge and accept that all user-generated content is subject to moderation and review
Reporting: We encourage users to report objectionable content through the in-app reporting feature
userResponsibilityItems: You are solely responsible for ensuring your content complies with these policies
You must not engage with or encourage others to post prohibited content
Repeated minor violations will result in escalating consequences, up to and including permanent account termination
ugcPolicy.acknowledgment: By creating an account and using TattooTalks, you confirm that you have read, understood, and agree to abide by this User Generated Content Policy.

privacy.title: Privacy
privacy.description: Your use of the App is also governed by our Privacy Policy. Please review our Privacy Policy to understand our practices.

accountDeletion.title: Account Deletion
accountDeletion.description: You have the right to delete your account at any time through the Profile settings in the App. When you delete your account:
items: All your personal data will be permanently removed from our servers
Your posts, comments, and other content will be permanently deleted
This action is irreversible and cannot be undone
You will need to create a new account if you wish to use the App again
accountDeletion.instructions: To delete your account, go to Profile > Delete My Account, and follow the confirmation steps.

termination.title: Termination by TattooTalks
termination.description: We may terminate or suspend your account and access to the App immediately, without prior notice, for conduct that we believe violates these Terms or is harmful to other users, us, or third parties.

medicalDisclaimer.title: Medical Disclaimer (Important)
medicalDisclaimer.intro: TattooTalks is not a medical provider. The content available on the App, including "Talks", comments, and discussions regarding tattoo aftercare, healing processes, or hygiene, is for informational and educational purposes only and does not constitute medical advice.
items: You should strictly follow the aftercare instructions provided by your professional tattoo artist
In case of infection, allergic reaction, or health concern, consult a doctor or dermatologist immediately
TattooTalks disclaims any liability for injuries or health issues resulting from reliance on user-generated content found on the platform

warranties.title: Disclaimer of Warranties
warranties.description: The App is provided "as is" without warranties of any kind, either express or implied. We do not warrant that the App will be uninterrupted, secure, or error-free.

liability.title: Limitation of Liability
liability.description: In no event shall TattooTalks be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages resulting from your use of the App.

changes.title: Changes to Terms
changes.description: We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. We will notify users of any material changes. Your continued use of the App after changes constitutes acceptance of the new terms.

governingLaw.title: Governing Law
governingLaw.description: These Terms shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of your jurisdiction, without regard to its conflict of law provisions.

contact.title: Contact Information
contact.description: If you have any questions about these Terms and Conditions, please contact us at:

column1.title: Target Your Interests
column1.description: From Guest Spots to conventions and hygiene. Find all the necessary info or ask your questions by specific theme.

column2.title: Create Your Talk
column2.description: Choose a theme and create a Talk. The perfect place to debate, share stories, or ask your questions.

column3.title: Artists, Shops & Art Lovers
column3.description: Whether you are inked or just curious to discover the culture, everyone is welcome to join the circle.

column4.title: Boost Your Career
column4.description: Find your next opportunity. From finding a mentorship to booking clients, build your path here.
